title: Cpvp Pack
description: A cpvp pack of low shield, low fire and other
body:
> ## Cpvp+
> **A crystal pack to let you better in cpvp, clean design!**
> 
> **It include:**
> - **low [Fire](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lower-fire)**
> - **low [Apple](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/marlowww+)**
> - **low [Sword](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/axe-pvp-texure-pack)**
> - **clean Crystal and Obi**
> - **clean Anchor**
> - **[Full Bright](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fullbright-ub)**
> - **low mace**
> - **no [Blast particle](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/marlowww+)**
> - **[Small Totem](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/marlowww+)**
> - **old [Enchant glint](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/classic-glint)**
> 
> **Report any bug at [discord](https://discord.gg/XzawdSEKeJ).**
> 
> **By [KhayHank](https://discord.gg/XzawdSEKeJ)**
